# TH3.E3 — Benchmark and Repo Dogfooding

## Epic Goal

Prove that graph-backed delegated workflow is worth its ceremony by capturing
local benchmark evidence and verifying that this repo's own agent workflow uses
it naturally.

## Stories

- `TH3.E3.US1` — Create delegated-workflow benchmark scenarios and local report artifacts
- `TH3.E3.US2` — Expose `graph workflow benchmark` summaries from local reports
- `TH3.E3.US3` — Wire this repo's delegated-task workflow through graph-backed snippets and hooks

## Done When

- the repo can record comparable with-graph and without-graph delegated-task runs
- benchmark summaries are available through a stable CLI-facing surface
- this repo's prompts, skills, and instructions make graph-backed delegation the normal path for non-trivial subtasks
